TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Jimmy Morales == ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 3, Jimmy Morales, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1969) mrhuw Guatemala ta' misuw hya' ga Jimmy Morales, aring ryax tay 14 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mintzyuwaw nya Jimmy Morales sa kawas 2011, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. qnxan nya Jimmy Morales maki tay kawas 1989 msqun ki Patricia Marroqu√≠n, tehuk misuw qani. Jimmy Morales hiya' ga, sswe' ni Sammy Morales. By the time he was 10 years old, he and his brother Sammy accompanied their grandfather to sell bananas and used clothing at the market in Santa Lucia. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == *immj morales~…ē == rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, *immj morales~…ē, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw …£uatemala ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a *immj morales~…ē, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. mintzjuwaw nja *immj morales~…ē s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, t ĒariŇč mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~…ēezi. qnxan nja *immj morales~…ē maki taj kawas~…ē **** ms~…ēqun ki patri ¶~ ®ia marroqu*n, teńßuk mis~…ēuw qani. *immj morales~…ē ńßija Ē …£a, s~…ēs~…ēwe Ē ni s~…ēammj morales~…ē. ő≤j tńße time ńße was~…ē ** jears~…ē ol*, ńße an* ńßis~…ē ő≤rotńßer s~…ēammj a ¶~ ® ¶~ ®ompanie* tńßeir …£ran**atńßer to s~…ēell ő≤ananas~…ē an* us~…ēe* ¶~ ®lotńßiŇč at tńße market in s~…ēanta lu ¶~ ®ia. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: == Jimmy Morales == ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 3, Jimmy Morales, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1969) mrhuw Guatemala ta' misuw hya' ga Jimmy Morales, aring ryax tay 14 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mintzyuwaw nya Jimmy Morales sa kawas 2011, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. qnxan nya Jimmy Morales maki tay kawas 1989 msqun ki Patricia Marroqu√≠n, tehuk misuw qani. Jimmy Morales hiya' ga, sswe' ni Sammy Morales. By the time he was 10 years old, he and his brother Sammy accompanied their grandfather to sell bananas and used clothing at the market in Santa Lucia. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == *immj morales~…ē == rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, *immj morales~…ē, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw …£uatemala ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a *immj morales~…ē, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. mintzjuwaw nja *immj morales~…ē s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, t ĒariŇč mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~…ēezi. qnxan nja *immj morales~…ē maki taj kawas~…ē **** ms~…ēqun ki patri ¶~ ®ia marroqu*n, teńßuk mis~…ēuw qani. *immj morales~…ē ńßija Ē …£a, s~…ēs~…ēwe Ē ni s~…ēammj morales~…ē. ő≤j tńße time ńße was~…ē ** jears~…ē ol*, ńße an* ńßis~…ē ő≤rotńßer s~…ēammj a ¶~ ® ¶~ ®ompanie* tńßeir …£ran**atńßer to s~…ēell ő≤ananas~…ē an* us~…ēe* ¶~ ®lotńßiŇč at tńße market in s~…ēanta lu ¶~ ®ia. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
